data.body: WS5 (male-welt-inlet) LANDED: commit 277480d6f. Prompt-only rubric enrichments to E6 (9 verify-cmd patterns) / T3 (3 axes + 4 evidence classes) / G3 (3-part + 3 contradiction patterns) / T5c / T11 / E2 / G4. git diff only reviewers/*.md per AC2. Closed first-try. 8/11 (WS1,6,7,2,3,11,4,5). Next: WS8 coach MOVE_REGISTRY (add foundation/enhancement=move10, sharpen move9, mirror docs table, no DEFERRED_MEASUREMENT).
